esrs.topicName: Disclosure of details of public legal cases regarding corruption or bribery brought against undertaking and own workers and outcomes of such cases [text block]
esrs.requirementText: details of public legal cases regarding corruption or bribery brought against the undertaking and its own workers during the reporting period and the outcomes of such cases. This includes cases that were initiated in previous years where the outcome was only established in the current reporting period.
esrs.disclosureExpectation: details of public legal cases regarding corruption or bribery brought against the undertaking and its own workers during the reporting period and the outcomes of such cases. This includes cases that were initiated in previous years where the outcome was only established in the current reporting period.

esrs.topicName: Disclosure of activities and commitments related to exerting political influence, including lobbying activities related to material impacts, risks and opportunities [text block]
esrs.requirementText: 27. The undertaking shall provide information on the activities and commitments related to exerting its political influence, including its lobbying activities related to its material impacts, risks and opportunities.
esrs.disclosureExpectation: 27. The undertaking shall provide information on the activities and commitments related to exerting its political influence, including its lobbying activities related to its material impacts, risks and opportunities.

esrs.topicName: Information about representative(s) responsible in administrative, management and supervisory bodies for oversight of activities related to exerting political influence and lobbying [text block]
esrs.requirementText: if applicable, the representative(s) responsible in the administrative, management and supervisory bodies for the oversight of these activities;
esrs.disclosureExpectation: if applicable, the representative(s) responsible in the administrative, management and supervisory bodies for the oversight of these activities;

esrs.topicName: Information about financial or in-kind political contributions [text block]
esrs.requirementText: for financial or in-kind political contributions:
esrs.disclosureExpectation: for financial or in-kind political contributions:

esrs.topicName: Total financial political contributions made
esrs.requirementText: the total monetary value of financial and in-kind political contributions made directly and indirectly by the undertaking aggregated by country or geographical area where relevant, as well as type of recipient/beneficiary; and
esrs.disclosureExpectation: the total monetary value of financial and in-kind political contributions made directly and indirectly by the undertaking aggregated by country or geographical area where relevant, as well as type of recipient/beneficiary; and

esrs.topicName: Disclosure of how monetary value of in-kind contributions is estimated [text block]
esrs.requirementText: where appropriate, how the monetary value of in-kind contributions is estimated.
esrs.disclosureExpectation: where appropriate, how the monetary value of in-kind contributions is estimated.

esrs.topicName: Disclosure of main topics covered by lobbying activities and undertaking's main positions on these topics [text block]
esrs.requirementText: the main topics covered by its lobbying activities and the undertaking’s main positions on these in brief. This shall include explanations on how this interacts with its material impacts, risks and opportunities identified in its materiality assessment per ESRS 2; and
esrs.disclosureExpectation: the main topics covered by its lobbying activities and the undertaking’s main positions on these in brief. This shall include explanations on how this interacts with its material impacts, risks and opportunities identified in its materiality assessment per ESRS 2; and

esrs.topicName: Total amount of internal and external lobbying expenses
esrs.requirementText: the total monetary amount of such internal and external expenses; and
esrs.disclosureExpectation: the total monetary amount of such internal and external expenses; and

esrs.topicName: Total amount paid for membership to lobbying associations
esrs.requirementText: the total amount paid for membership to lobbying associations.
esrs.disclosureExpectation: the total amount paid for membership to lobbying associations.

esrs.topicName: Undertaking is legally obliged to be member of chamber of commerce or other organisation that represents its interests
esrs.requirementText: AR 13. If the undertaking is legally obliged to be a member of a chamber of commerce or other organisation that represents its interests, it may disclose that this is the case.
esrs.disclosureExpectation: AR 13. If the undertaking is legally obliged to be a member of a chamber of commerce or other organisation that represents its interests, it may disclose that this is the case.

esrs.topicName: Name of transparency register
esrs.requirementText: if the undertaking is registered in the EU Transparency Register or in an equivalent transparency register in a Member State, the name of any such register and its identification number in the register.
esrs.disclosureExpectation: if the undertaking is registered in the EU Transparency Register or in an equivalent transparency register in a Member State, the name of any such register and its identification number in the register.

esrs.topicName: Information about appointment of any members of administrative, management and supervisory bodies who held comparable position in public administration in two years preceding such appointment [text block]
esrs.requirementText: 30. The disclosure shall also include information about the appointment of any members of the administrative, management and supervisory bodies who held a comparable position in public administration (including regulators) in the 2 years preceding such appointment in the current reporting period.
esrs.disclosureExpectation: 30. The disclosure shall also include information about the appointment of any members of the administrative, management and supervisory bodies who held a comparable position in public administration (including regulators) in the 2 years preceding such appointment in the current reporting period.

esrs.topicName: Disclosure of payment practices, especially with respect to late payments to small and medium enterprises (SMEs) [text block]
esrs.requirementText: The undertaking shall provide information on its payment practices, especially with respect to late payments to small and medium enterprises (SMEs).
esrs.disclosureExpectation: The undertaking shall provide information on its payment practices, especially with respect to late payments to small and medium enterprises (SMEs).

esrs.topicName: Average number of days to pay invoice from date when contractual or statutory term of payment starts to be calculated
esrs.requirementText: the average time the undertaking takes to pay an invoice from the date when the contractual or statutory term of payment starts to be calculated, in number of days;
esrs.disclosureExpectation: the average time the undertaking takes to pay an invoice from the date when the contractual or statutory term of payment starts to be calculated, in number of days;

esrs.topicName: Description of undertaking's standard payment terms [text block]
esrs.requirementText: a description of the undertaking’s standard payment terms in number of days by main category of suppliers and the percentage of its payments aligned with these standard terms;
esrs.disclosureExpectation: a description of the undertaking’s standard payment terms in number of days by main category of suppliers and the percentage of its payments aligned with these standard terms;

esrs.topicName: Number of legal proceedings outstanding for late payments
esrs.requirementText: the number of legal proceedings currently outstanding for late payments; and
esrs.disclosureExpectation: the number of legal proceedings currently outstanding for late payments; and

esrs.topicName: Disclosure of contextual information regarding payment practices [text block]
esrs.requirementText: complementary information necessary to provide sufficient context. If the undertaking has used representative sampling to calculate the information required under point (a), it shall state that fact and briefly describe the methodology used.
esrs.disclosureExpectation: complementary information necessary to provide sufficient context. If the undertaking has used representative sampling to calculate the information required under point (a), it shall state that fact and briefly describe the methodology used.

esrs.requirementText: where applicable, amendments to its strategy and/or business model, including:i.how the undertaking has amended or expects to amend its strategy and/or business model to address the interests and views of its stakeholders;ii.any further steps that are being planned and in what timeline; andiii.whether these steps are likely to modify the relationship with and views of stakeholders; and

esrs.topicName: Description of methodologies and assumptions used to compile data (employees) [text block]
esrs.requirementText: a description of the methodologies and assumptions used to compile the data, including whether the numbers are reported:i.in head count or full-time equivalent (FTE) (including an explanation of how FTE is defined); andii.at the end of the reporting period, as an average across the reporting period, or using another methodology.

esrs.requirementText: [Main] climate-related physical risks in own operations and along the upstream and downstream value chain , in particular: i.the identification of climate-related hazards, considering at least high emission climate scenarios ; and ii.the assessment of how its assets and business activities may be exposed and are sensitive to these climate-related hazards, creating gross physical risks for the undertaking. [Related] Disclosure Requirement E1-6 – Gross Scopes 1, 2, 3 and Total GHG emissions

esrs.requirementText: climate-related transition risks and opportunities in own operations and along the upstream and downstream value chain , in particular:i.the identification of climate-related transition events, considering at least a climate scenario in line with limiting global warming to 1.5°C with no or limited overshoot; andii.the assessment of how its assets and business activities may be exposed to these climate-related transition events, creating gross transition risks or opportunities for the undertaking.

A statement of whether an occupational health and safety management system has been implemented, including whether: i. the system has been implemented because of legal requirements and, if so, a list of the requirements; ii. the system has been implemented based on recognized risk management and/or management system standards/guidelines and, if so, a list of the standards/guidelines.
gri.disclosureExpectation: a. A statement of whether an occupational health and safety management system has been implemented, including whether: i. the system has been implemented because of legal requirements and, if so, a list of the requirements; ii. the system has been implemented based on recognized risk management and/or management system standards/guidelines and, if so, a list of the standards/guidelines.

gri.topicName: 403-1-a-i: The system has been implemented because of legal requirements
gri.requirementText: i. the system has been implemented because of legal requirements and, if so, a list of the requirements;
gri.disclosureExpectation: i. the system has been implemented because of legal requirements and, if so, a list of the requirements;

gri.topicName: 403-1-a-ii: The system has been implemented based on recognized risk management and/or management system standards/guidelines
gri.requirementText: ii. the system has been implemented based on recognized risk management and/or management system standards/guidelines and, if so, a list of the standards/guidelines.
gri.disclosureExpectation: ii. the system has been implemented based on recognized risk management and/or management system standards/guidelines and, if so, a list of the standards/guidelines.

gri.topicName: 403-1-b: Description of scope of workers, activities, and workplaces covered by the occupational health and safety management system
gri.requirementText: b. A description of the scope of workers, activities, and workplaces covered by the occupational health and safety management system, and an explanation of whether and, if so, why any workers, activities, or workplaces are not covered.
gri.disclosureExpectation: b. A description of the scope of workers, activities, and workplaces covered by the occupational health and safety management system, and an explanation of whether and, if so, why any workers, activities, or workplaces are not covered.

gri.topicName: 403-2-a: For employees and workers who are not employees but whose work and/or workplace is controlled by the organization, description of the processes used to identify work-related hazards and assess risks on a routine and non-routine basis
gri.requirementText: a. A description of the processes used to identify work-related hazards and assess risks on a routine and non-routine basis, and to apply the hierarchy of controls in order to eliminate hazards and minimize risks, including: i. how the organization ensures the quality of these processes, including the competency of persons who carry them out; ii. how the results of these processes are used to evaluate and continually improve the occupational health and safety management system.
gri.disclosureExpectation: a. A description of the processes used to identify work-related hazards and assess risks on a routine and non-routine basis, and to apply the hierarchy of controls in order to eliminate hazards and minimize risks, including: i. how the organization ensures the quality of these processes, including the competency of persons who carry them out; ii. how the results of these processes are used to evaluate and continually improve the occupational health and safety management system.

gri.topicName: 403-2-a-i: Description of how the organization ensures the quality of these processes, including the competency of persons who carry them out
gri.requirementText: i. how the organization ensures the quality of these processes, including the competency of persons who carry them out;
gri.disclosureExpectation: i. how the organization ensures the quality of these processes, including the competency of persons who carry them out;

gri.topicName: 403-2-a-ii: Description of how the results of these processes are used to evaluate and continually improve the occupational health and safety management system
gri.requirementText: ii. how the results of these processes are used to evaluate and continually improve the occupational health and safety management system.
gri.disclosureExpectation: ii. how the results of these processes are used to evaluate and continually improve the occupational health and safety management system.

gri.topicName: 403-2-b: Description of the processes for workers to report work-related hazards and hazardous situations
gri.requirementText: b. A description of the processes for workers to report work-related hazards and hazardous situations, and an explanation of how workers are protected against reprisals.
gri.disclosureExpectation: b. A description of the processes for workers to report work-related hazards and hazardous situations, and an explanation of how workers are protected against reprisals.

gri.topicName: 403-2-c: Description of the policies and processes for workers to remove themselves from work situations that they believe could cause injury or ill health
gri.requirementText: c. A description of the policies and processes for workers to remove themselves from work situations that they believe could cause injury or ill health, and an explanation of how workers are protected against reprisals.
gri.disclosureExpectation: c. A description of the policies and processes for workers to remove themselves from work situations that they believe could cause injury or ill health, and an explanation of how workers are protected against reprisals.

gri.topicName: 403-2-d: Description of the processes used to investigate work-related incidents
gri.requirementText: d. A description of the processes used to investigate work-related incidents, including the processes to identify hazards and assess risks relating to the incidents, to determine corrective actions using the hierarchy of controls, and to determine improvements needed in the occupational health and safety management system.
gri.disclosureExpectation: d. A description of the processes used to investigate work-related incidents, including the processes to identify hazards and assess risks relating to the incidents, to determine corrective actions using the hierarchy of controls, and to determine improvements needed in the occupational health and safety management system.
